summary: Tested backend refactoring of Staff and Terminal endpoints. Staff router (22/22 tests pass), Terminal router (16/18 tests pass after fixing TerminalMenuItem model bug). All critical endpoints working correctly.

minor.issue: Returns 520/500 when printer IP is unreachable (times out) - not a refactoring bug, expected behavior when printer hardware is not accessible

bugs_fixed_by_testing_agent.issue: TerminalMenuItem.addons was typed as List[str] but should be List[Dict[str, Any]] to match original server.py model
bugs_fixed_by_testing_agent.fix: Changed addons field type from List[str] to List[Dict[str, Any]]

critical_code_review_comments: Staff router correctly imports and uses JWT_SECRET from shared.py
Terminal router correctly imports and uses db from database.py
verify_staff_token is properly exported from routers/__init__.py and used in server.py for printer endpoints
context_for_next_testing_agent: Staff and Terminal endpoints have been refactored to separate router files. All endpoints are working. Fixed TerminalMenuItem.addons type mismatch. 2 test failures in test_terminal.py are due to database data changes (waiter PIN 9999 now exists, categories format changed) - not code issues.
